assertions.assertion: Sets options.PushedAuthorization.Required = true in AddIdentityServer options
Sets options.PushedAuthorization.Lifetime = 300 (5 minutes in seconds, as int not TimeSpan)
assertions.rationale: Line 16 sets options.PushedAuthorization.Lifetime = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(5), which is a TimeSpan not an int. The Duende API expects an int (seconds).

assertions.assertion: Sets RequirePushedAuthorization = true on the banking_app client
assertions.rationale: Line 30 sets RequirePushedAuthorization = true on the banking_app client.

assertions.assertion: Sets PushedAuthorizationLifetime = 900 on the banking_app client to override global lifetime
assertions.rationale: PushedAuthorizationLifetime is never set on the banking_app client. The per-client override is missing.

assertions.assertion: Mentions PAR requires Business or Enterprise edition (version >= 7.0)
assertions.rationale: No mention of edition requirements or version constraints for PAR.
